vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: SQL Injection in SIEM search API
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SQL injection in AethonShield search API allowing unauthenticated access to security event data
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch or discontinue use of SIEM platform
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub for appsec-lab — Aethon Security. Class II product with active CRA Art. 14 notification.

vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Hardcoded credentials in AethonShield endpoint agent allowing lateral movement
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Rotate credentials and issue agent update

vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Predictable authentication tokens in AethonShield API
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Implement cryptographic token generation and rotate existing tokens
